mission.title: jaeger: Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of various metrics?
mission.description: Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of various metrics?. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current jaeger deployment
steps.description:
Verify your jaeger version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
helm list -n observability 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working jaeger installation.

steps.title: Review jaeger configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger
```
Supporting prometheus metrcis is a good thing for me ,but i find it is difficult to totally understand the real meaning of the metrics exposed by jaeger-agent,jaeger-collector and jaeger-query.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of…
steps.description:
## Which problem is this PR solving?
- Resolves #1224.

## Short description of the changes
- Golang script to parse metric tags and write a GitHub-flavored markdown table with app (e.g. agent, collector, ingester, etc.), metric name, metric tags, and description.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Which problem is this PR solving?
- Resolves #1224.

## Short description of the changes
- Golang script to parse metric tags and write a GitHub-flavored markdown table with app (e.g. agent, collector, ingester, etc.), metric name, metric tags, and description.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with jaeger installed or the issue environment reproducible.
